name: caltask
title: CalTask
description: Track tasks with timer, manage calendar events, AI-powered search, and time reporting
author: dennis_cheng

commands.name: task-history
commands.title: CalTask
commands.subtitle: Calendar
commands.description: Timer, upcoming events, recent history, AI search, and event management

commands.name: task-report
commands.title: CalTask Report
commands.subtitle: Calendar
commands.description: Generate time reports from Mac Calendar events

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: CalTask Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Calendar
commands.description: Show current task timer in menu bar

commands.name: manage-calendars
commands.title: Manage Calendars
commands.subtitle: CalTask
commands.description: Toggle visible calendars and set default calendar

preferences.name: aiModel
preferences.title: AI Model
preferences.description: AI model to use for smart features

preferences.name: upcomingDays
preferences.title: Upcoming Events Days
preferences.description: Number of days ahead to show in Upcoming section

preferences.name: recentHistoryDays
preferences.title: Recent History Days
preferences.description: Number of days back to show in Recent History

preferences.name: defaultEventDuration
preferences.title: Default Event Duration
preferences.description: Default duration for new events without an end time

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
